##NAMES=Manitobaite
##RRUFFID=R130260
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_16_Mn^2+^_25_Al_8_(PO_4_)_30_
##LOCALITY=Gottcha Claim (Pegmatite No. 22), Cross Lake, Manitoba, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Green or brown massive
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_14.11_Ca_1.02_ [box]_0.87_)(Mn^2+^_20.86_Fe^2+^_3.1_Mg_0.40_Zn^2+^_0.25_)(Al_7.21_Fe^3+^_0.79_)P_30.07_Si_0.07_O_120_
